## tested

- [ ] loaded as unpacked extension
- [ ] pill renders on a fresh claude.ai conversation
- [ ] pill updates after sending and receiving messages
- [ ] popup settings save and persist
- [ ] no new console errors
- [ ] verified manifest still has minimal permissions

## checklist

- [ ] updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[unreleased]`
- [ ] no new dependencies added (or, if added, lockfile committed and reasoning explained)
- [ ] no expanded permissions in `manifest.json`
